Java bindings for tree-sitter-language-pack using Panama FFI (JDK 22+).

## Installation

```xml
<dependency>
  <groupId>io.github.tree-sitter</groupId>
  <artifactId>tree-sitter-language-pack</artifactId>
  <version>2.0.0-alpha.1</version>
</dependency>
```

```groovy
implementation("io.github.tree-sitter:tree-sitter-language-pack:2.0.0-alpha.1")
```

## Quick Start

```java
import io.github.treesitter.languagepack.TsPackRegistry;

try (var registry = new TsPackRegistry()) {
    var languages = registry.availableLanguages();
    System.out.println(languages);

    var lang = registry.getLanguage("python");
    System.out.println("Loaded: " + lang);
}
```

## API Reference

For detailed API documentation, see the [Java package](https://github.com/Goldziher/tree-sitter-language-pack/tree/main/crates/ts-pack-java).
